item.title: 如何在 Azure 门户中为用户成员分配角色并控制对其中资源的访问 | HOW TO ASSIGN A ROLE TO USER MEMBERS IN AZURE PORTAL AND CONTROL ACCESS TO THE RESOURCES WITHIN IT
item.description:
蒂贾尼莫吉德

发表于 5 月 10 日

基于角色的访问控制 (RBAC) 是 Azure 中的一种主要授权机制，可让你定义谁有权访问 Azure 资源以及他们可以使用这些资源做什么。 例如，如果您是一家大型组织，您可能有一个团队负责网络，另一个团队负责管理 VM，另一个团队负责数据库和数据库服务器，等等。 例如，您可以使用 RBAC 让您的 SQL 团队成员能够： 管理 SQL Server VM 和 Azure SQL 数据库。 或者，您可以使用 RBAC 使 Linux 团队能够管理您的 Linux 服务器而不是 Windows 服务器，反之亦然。 可以通过多种方式使用 RBAC 来控制 Azure 管理功能，包括管理用户、资源、VNet 等。 以下是您可以如何使用 RBAC 的一些示例列表： • 允许您的服务器团队管理订阅中的 VM，并允许您的网络团队管理虚拟网络。 要应用 RBAC，您首先要创建一个角色分配，它由三个元素组成，这些元素可以有效地转换为谁、什么和在哪里： • 安全主体：指定角色分配将应用到的个人用户、组或托管身份。 以下是有关如何在 Azure 中为用户分配角色的步骤

登录 Azure 门户并单击搜索栏搜索 Azure Active Directory 以创建用户帐户

单击 Azure Active Directory，您将显示一个页面，您现在将在其中单击用户。 见下图

单击用户后，下一步是在显示的新用户页面中填写必要的信息，然后单击创建，如下所示


单击创建后，您的新用户将在您的中创建，您现在可以单击页面顶部的重置密码并重置密码，然后复制将用户名和密码发送给您要分配角色的人员或团队访问并有权访问 Azure 门户中的资源。 见下图

在此阶段，已创建用户名和密码。
下一步是通过返回门户主页为用户分配角色，然后搜索资源组。 在此之后，您可以通过单击创建并在其中填写信息来创建新的资源组，或者您可以从之前创建的资源组中进行选择，如下图所示

选择后，点击资源组，点击资源组页面右侧的访问控制（IAM）。 请参阅下图以进行说明


之后，点击添加


单击添加后，将显示以下页面，并在搜索栏中键入您希望用户访问的资源类型或您要分配的角色。 选择角色，点击下一步

单击下一步后，下一页是成员，您将在其中为要授予所选资源访问权限的成员


选择会员

然后点击选择

单击选择后，接下来您将看到一个页面，其中显示了您分配的角色的详细信息、用户名和角色。 看过下图


现在我已经成功地为 Alisha 分配了一个角色，分配给她的角色是 Virtual Machine Contributors。

感谢您的阅读，我希望本文能作为如何在 AZURE 中分配角色的指南。

一旦暂停，mojeed-88 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，mojeed-88 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，mojeed-88 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 mojeed-88 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 mojeed-88 的方法：

降低 mojeed-88 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 mojeed-88 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Tijani Mojeed

Posted on May 10

   

Role-based access control (RBAC) is a primary authorization mechanism in Azure that enables you to define who has access to Azure resources and what they can do with those resources. For example, if yours is a large organization, you likely have a team responsible for networking, another team for managing VMs, another for databases and database servers, and so on. RBAC enables you to apply that role-based governance to your Azure resources. For example, you could use RBAC to enable the members of your SQL team to: Manage SQL Server VMs and Azure SQL Databases. Or, you might use RBAC to enable a Linux team to manage your Linux servers but not Windows servers, and vice versa. You can use RBAC in many ways to control Azure management functions, including managing users, resources, VNets, and so on. Following is a list of some examples of how you might use RBAC: • Allow your server team to manage VMs in a subscription and your network team to manage the virtual networks. • Allow your DBA team to manage database VMs and databases in one or more resource groups. • Allow a user to manage all resources in a particular resource group. • Allow an application to access specific resources in a resource group. • Allow a small group of users to manage users in Azure. To apply RBAC, you first create a role assignment, which consists of three elements that effectively translate to who, what, and where: • Security principal: Specifies the individual user, group, or managed identity to which the role assignment will apply. • Role definition: A collection of permissions that specifies the operations that can be performed, such as read, write, and delete. • Scope: Specifies the resources to which the role assignment applies. Below are the steps on how to assign role to a user in an Azure

Login into Azure portal and click on the search bar to search for Azure Active Directory to create a user account

Click on Azure Active Directory and you will a page displayed where you will now click on user. See below image

After clicking on the user, the next is to fill the necessary information in new user page that displayed and click on create as seen below


After clicking on create, your new user would be created in your and you can now click on reset password at the top of the page and reset password, then copy send the user's name and password to the person or team that you want to assign role to and have access to the Resources in your Azure portal. see below image

At this stage, the user's name and Password has been created.
The next step is to assign role to the user by going back to portal Home, then search for Resources Group. After this, you can create new Resources group by clicking on create and fill the information therein OR you can select from the one you have created before as shown in the image below

After selecting, click on the Resources group and click on Access control (IAM) at the right-hand side of the Resource group page. See below image for clarification


After that, click on Add


After clicking on Add, you the below page displayed and type on the search bar what type the Resources you want the user to have access to or the role you want to assign. Select the role and click on next

After clicking on next, the next page is Members where you will the member that you want to give access to selected resource


Select member

Then click on select

After clicking on select, the next you will see is a page that shows the details of the role you assigned, the user's name, the role. Seen the image below


Now I have successfully assigned a role to Alisha and the role assigned to her is Virtual Machine Contributors.

THANK YOU FOR READING AND I HOPE THIS WILL SERVE AS A GUIDE ON HOW TO ASSIGN ROLE IN AZURE.

item.title: 使用 Python 和 YOLO-NAS 进行目标检测 | Object Detection Using Python And YOLO-NAS
item.description:
你好！ 在本教程中，我将向您展示如何使用 Python 和 YOLO-NAS 检测图像和视频中的对象。 我以前做过一个关于对象检测的教程，但是这个更容易，对初学者也很友好。 创建虚拟环境

我们需要做的第一件事是创建并激活虚拟环境，这可以通过以下命令完成：

 python3 -m venv env source env/bin/activate

完毕！ 接下来我们需要创建一个需求文件并安装依赖项。

安装依赖项

创建 requirements.txt 文件并添加以下内容：

 imutils torchinfo torch super-gradients

要安装依赖项，请运行以下命令：

 pip install -r requirements.txt

现在我们终于可以开始编码了。 检测图像中的对象

首先，我将向您展示如何检测图像中的对象，打开一个名为 image.py 的文件并添加以下导入：

 import gc import os import torch from torchinfo import summary from super_gradients.training import models import argparse

接下来我们需要创建一个方法来检测图像中的对象，代码如下：

 def detect_objects(image): device = torch.device("cpu") model = models.get("yolo_nas_s", pretrained_weights="coco").to(device) out = model.predict(image, conf=0.6) out.save("predictions"); del model gc.collect() torch.cuda.empty_cache()

上述方法采用图像补丁、检测对象，然后将输出保存到预测目录。 最后我们清理一下。 最后我们需要一个main方法：

 if __name__ == "__main__": os.makedirs("predictions", exist_ok=True) ap = argparse.ArgumentParser() ap.add_argument("-i", "--image", required = True, help = "Path to input file") args = vars(ap.parse_args()) detect_objects(args["image"])

最后，该命令可以通过以下方式运行：

 python image.py -i [path to image file]

完成后，您应该会看到类似于以下内容的内容：

凉爽的！ 检测视频中的对象

检测视频中的对象与上面的代码完全相同，除了我们传递视频文件而不是图像文件。

由于我已经解释了上面代码的作用，所以我将在此处提供完整代码：

 import gc import os import torch from torchinfo import summary from super_gradients.training import models import argparse def detect_objects(video): device = torch.device("cpu") model = models.get("yolo_nas_s", pretrained_weights="coco").to(device) out = model.predict(video) out.save("predictions") del model gc.collect() torch.cuda.empty_cache() if __name__ == "__main__": os.makedirs("predictions", exist_ok=True) ap = argparse.ArgumentParser() ap.add_argument("-v", "--video", required = True, help = "path to input video") args = vars(ap.parse_args()) detect_objects(args["video"])

请注意，我将图像参数更改为视频参数。

这可以通过以下方式运行：

 python video.py -v [path to video file]

处理后的视频现在应该出现在您的当前目录中。

结论

在这里，我展示了如何使用 python 和 YOLO 来使用新的 YOLO NAS 检测图像和视频中的对象。

我希望这对你有所启发，因为我在尝试新的 YOLO 时获得了很多乐趣。 注意如果你想使用GPU而不是CPU，把cpu换成cuda。

与往常一样，您可以通过我的 Github 找到上述示例代码：
快乐编码！ 喜欢我工作？ 我发布了各种主题，如果你想看到更多，请喜欢并关注我。
我也喜欢咖啡。

如果您想学习算法模式以在编码面试中脱颖而出，我推荐 以下课程



原文:

Hello! 😃

In this tutorial I will show you how to use Python and YOLO-NAS to detect objects in both images and videos. 😎

YOLO-NAS is the faster and more accurate then it's predecessors.

I have done a tutorial about object detection before but this one is a lot more easier and beginner friendly IMO. 😸

Creating The Virtual Environment

First thing we need to do is create and activate the virtual environment, this can be done with the following commands:

python3 -m venv env
source env/bin/activate

Done! Next we need to create a requirements file and install the dependencies.

Installing The Dependencies

Create a requirements.txt file and add the following:

imutils
torchinfo
torch
super-gradients

To install the dependencies, run the following command:

pip install -r requirements.txt

Now we can finally start coding. 😄

Detecting Objects In Images

First I will show you how to detect objects in images, open a file called image.py and add the following imports:

import gc
import os
import torch
from torchinfo import summary
from super_gradients.training import models
import argparse

Next we need to create a method to detect objects in the image, the code to do this is as follows:

def detect_objects(image): device = torch.device("cpu") model = models.get("yolo_nas_s", pretrained_weights="coco").to(device) out = model.predict(image, conf=0.6) out.save("predictions"); del model gc.collect() torch.cuda.empty_cache()

The above method takes an image patch, detects objects and then saves the output to the predictions directory. Finally we clean up. 🧹

Finally we need a main method:

if __name__ == "__main__": os.makedirs("predictions", exist_ok=True) ap = argparse.ArgumentParser() ap.add_argument("-i", "--image", required = True, help = "Path to input file") args = vars(ap.parse_args()) detect_objects(args["image"])

The main method takes an image argument and then passes it to the detect_objects method defined earlier.

Finally the command can be run via:

python image.py -i [path to image file]

Once done you should have something similiar to the following:

Cool! 😆 Next we will do videos

Detecting Objects In Videos

Detecting objects in videos is exactly the same as the above code except instead of an image file we pass a video file.

Since I've explained what the code does above I will provide the full code here:

import gc
import os
import torch
from torchinfo import summary
from super_gradients.training import models
import argparse def detect_objects(video): device = torch.device("cpu") model = models.get("yolo_nas_s", pretrained_weights="coco").to(device) out = model.predict(video) out.save("predictions") del model gc.collect() torch.cuda.empty_cache() if __name__ == "__main__": os.makedirs("predictions", exist_ok=True) ap = argparse.ArgumentParser() ap.add_argument("-v", "--video", required = True, help = "path to input video") args = vars(ap.parse_args()) detect_objects(args["video"])

Notice that I changed the image argument to a video argument.

This can run via:

python video.py -v [path to video file]

The processed video should now appear in your current directory.

Conclusion

Here I have shown how to use python and YOLO to detect objects in images and video using the new YOLO NAS.

I hope this has taught you something as I had a lot of fun trying out the new YOLO. 😄

Note if you want to use GPU instead of CPU, replace cpu with cuda.

As always you can find the sample code for the above via my Github:
github.com/ethand91/yolonas-object-dete…

Happy Coding! 😎

Like me work? I post about a variety of topics, if you would like to see more please like and follow me.
Also I love coffee.

If you are looking to learn Algorithm Patterns to ace the coding interview I recommend the following course

item.title: PHP：数据类型 | PHP: types of data
item.description:
在 PHP（及以后）中可以将各种数据类型分配给变量，从简单的字符串和数字到更复杂的数据类型，如数组和对象。 这些数据类型中的每一种都用于构造变量。
现在让我们详细看看各个数据类型：

整数
整数是没有小数点的数字（例如 0、1、2、-1、-2、-3），可以指定为：

  1. 十进制表示法（以 10 为基数）

  2. 十六进制表示法（以 16 为基数，前缀为 0x）

  3. 八进制表示法（基数 8，前缀为 0）

数字前面可以有选择地加上 - 或 + 号。

字符串
字符串只不过是一系列字符，其中每个字符相当于一个字节。 一个字符串最大可达 2GB，可以包含字母、数字和特殊字符。 指定字符串的最简单方法是将其括在单引号中（'Hello world!'），但是，也可以使用双引号（"Hello world!"）。

浮点数字
布尔值
布尔值只能表示两种类型的值：1(true) 或 0(false)。

大批
数组是一种变量，一次可以保存多个值，用于聚合一组相关项，例如一组城市或国家/地区名称。 形式上，数组被定义为值的索引数据集合； 每个索引（称为键）唯一地表示它所引用的值。

对象
一种更复杂的数据类型是对象。 这些不仅允许存储数据，还包含有关如何处理数据的信息。 每个对象都是类的一个特定实例，类作为它的模型； 对象是根据这个模型使用关键字new精确创建的。 重要的是要知道每个对象都有与其父类对应的属性和方法：每个实例都是独立的，有自己的属性和方法，因此可以独立于同一类的其他对象进行操作。

无效的
特殊值 NULL 在 PHP 语言中用来表示空变量。 这种类型的变量是没有数据的变量。

原文:

A variety of data types can be assigned to a variable in PHP(and beyond), ranging from simple strings and numbers to more complex data types such as arrays and objects. The PHP language offers support for eight primitive data types: Integer, Floating-point numbers, Strings, Booleans, Arrays, Objects, NULL; each of these data types is used to construct variables.
Let us now look in detail at the individual data types:

Integer
Integers are numbers without decimal points(Ex. 0, 1, 2, -1, -2, -3), and can be specified in:

  1. Decimal notation (base 10)

  2. Hexadecimal notation (base 16 with, prefixed with 0x)

  3. Octal notation (base 8, with prefix 0)

Numbers may optionally be preceded by the - or + sign.

Strings
Strings are nothing more than a sequence of characters, where each is equivalent to one byte. A string can be up to 2GB in size, and can contain letters, numbers, and special characters. The simplest way to specify a string is to enclose it in single quotation marks ('Hello world!'), however, double quotation marks can also be used ("Hello world!").

Floating Point Numbers
I numeri in virgola mobile sono numeri frazionari o decimali, come quelli mostrati di seguito:

$x = 1.456

$y = 10.2e3

$z = 4E-10

Booleans
Booleans can represent only two types of values: 1(true) or 0(false).

Array
An array is a type of variable that can hold more than one value at a time, and is used to aggregate a set of related items such as, for example, a set of city or country names. Formally, an array is defined as an indexed data collection of values; each index (known as a key), uniquely represents the value it refers to.

Objects
A more complex type of data is objects. These allow not only the storage of data, but also contain information on how to process it. Each object is a specific instance of a class that serves as a model for it; objects are created precisely according to this model, using the keyword new. It is important to know that each object has properties and methods that correspond to those of its parent class: each instance is independent, with its own properties and methods, and can therefore be manipulated independently of other objects of the same class.

Null
The special value NULL is used to represent empty variables in the PHP language. A variable of this type is a variable with no data.

Sergey Bolshchikov - May 1

原文:

Samson Ojugo

Posted on May 10

A DocBlock explains the purpose of a specific class, method, or other structural component. DocComments are a specific form of comment that always enclose DocBlocks. A DocComment is denoted by the characters /** (opener) and */ (closer).
There should be an asterisk (*) at the beginning of every line between the DocComment opener and its closer.

The phpdoc command can be used with phpDocumentor to provide comprehensive documentation for your Laravel project.

这份伦敦顶级应用程序开发公司名单是基于不同的变量，如工作经验、技能、项目规模和时薪。

伦敦排名前五的移动应用程序开发公司

它是伦敦一家知名的移动应用程序开发公司。 为各种规模和行业的公司提供全面的 IT 服务，包括 Web 和 APP 开发、UI/UX 设计、电子商务开发、定制软件开发和 CRM 咨询。 他们专注于构建定制的 IT 解决方案以满足企业的需求和偏好。

多年来，他们已经完成了 500 多个项目，并扩大到拥有 120 多名天才的员工队伍。 他们总是在他们独特的项目中使用尖端和行业标准的技术，例如 React Native、Swift、Flutter、Kotlin、Ionic、Xamarin、Angular 等。 由于他们为全球客户提供的软件解决方案的可靠性和质量，他们拥有惊人的 97% 的客户保留率。

他们的专家团队提供创造性的解决方案，帮助他们的客户在当今瞬息万变的 IT 环境中保持竞争力。

他们拥有多元化的客户群，其中包括中小型企业以及大型国际公司。 他们提供高质量的服务，并与客户建立长期的关系。

通过帮助企业发现平凡中的非凡之处，他们能够让消费者再次光顾。 这就是为什么他们的产品为客户创造了超过 10 亿英镑的年收入。

他们获得了十年移动营销品牌、最有效的应用程序、移动广告投资回报率增幅最大以及年度数字代理商等荣誉。

他们的工作人员愉快而专业，他们在软件开发方面处于行业领先地位。 他们提供从初创产品开发到企业级解决方案的技术解决方案。

他们在区块链、物联网、增强现实/虚拟现实、软件开发、网站设计和开发、人工智能等方面拥有专业知识。

他们可以远程或亲自工作，具体取决于最适合贵公司的方式。 无论您是初创企业、小型企业还是大型企业，他们都可以为您的项目提供帮助。 您始终可以依靠 Chimpare 来发现满足您特定要求的最佳解决方案。

他们是一家位于伦敦和哥本哈根的机构。 他们专注于为 iOS、Android 和 Windows Phone 开发移动应用程序。

他们已经为 Carlsberg、Samsung、G4S/ISS 和 BMW 等公司完成了 1100 多个数字系统和 200 多个定制移动应用程序。

结论

祝您在寻找伦敦最好的移动应用程序开发公司时好运。 然而，请记住，虽然伦敦的应用程序开发人员正在通过根本性的改进来提高应用程序的可用性，但在从全球最好的应用程序开发公司中进行选择时，您仍然必须检查上述所有可能性。 上面列出的组织与来自不同国家的客户合作，了解他们目标地区的市场和经济，并提供了以最低的移动应用程序开发成本成功满足目标受众需求的项目。 这些开发人员拥有多年的经验，将为您提供出色的商业建议。



原文:

The Mobile app has the power to connect with the target audience, market the product or services and increase the revenue all at the same time. All you need is an expert mobile app development company in London that can help to build the perfect app. Finding a Company which has expertise in the field, understands your audience, and fulfils your needs.

In this blog, we have listed the companies which offer custom app developers, representing your business goals and values. Apart from that, another reason to hire app developers from London is they hold years of experience, expertise, and tech skill to build feature-rich apps while considering all your development requirements.

You don't have to stress about these company development processes as they have delivered so many profitable apps in different industries. Also you can read a mobile app development guide which will help you in finding the perfect developer according to your project.

This list of top app development companies in London is based on different variables like work experience, skills, project size, and hourly rate.

Top Five Mobile App Development Company in London

1. MobileCoderz Technologies Pvt Ltd

MobileCoderz is a prominent Digital Transformation Company. It is a well known mobile app development company in London. Offering a comprehensive range of IT services to companies of all sizes and industries, including Web & APP development, UI/UX design, eCommerce development, Custom Software Development, and CRM consulting. They Specialise in building customised IT solutions to meet the demands and preferences of enterprises.

They have completed over 500 projects and expanded to a workforce of over 120 geniuses throughout the years. They always use cutting-edge and industry-standard technologies in their unique projects, such as React Native, Swift, Flutter, Kotlin, Ionic, Xamarin, Angular, and others. Because of the dependability and quality of their software solutions for global clients, they have an astounding 97% client retention rate.

2. Dotsquares


Dotsquares is a leading IT firm that was founded in 2002. They specialise in offering IT services to organisations of all sizes and industries. Their expert staff offers creative solutions that assist their clients remain competitive in today's ever-changing IT landscape.

They have a varied client base that comprises small and medium-sized businesses as well as huge international firms. They provide high-quality service and develop long-term relationships with the clients.

3. Future Platforms

They are able to keep consumers coming back for more by helping businesses uncover the extraordinary in the ordinary. This is why their products have generated over £1 billion in annual income for their clients.

They received honours for Mobile Marketing Brand of the Decade, Most Effective App, Largest Increase in ROI for a Mobile Campaign, and Digital Agency of the Year.

4. Chimpare

Chimpare is based in Fareham, England, and has offices in London, New York, Toronto, and Dubai. Their crew is pleasant and professional, and they lead the industry in software development. They provide tech solutions ranging from start-up product development to corporate level solutions.

They have expertise in Blockchain, IOT, AR/VR, Software Development, Website Design & Development, AI, etc.

They can work remotely or in person, depending on what is best for your company. They can help you with your project whether you are a start-up, small business, or huge enterprise. You can always rely on Chimpare to discover the best solution for your specific requirements.

5. Nodes


They are a London and Copenhagen-based agency. They specialise in the development of mobile apps for iOS, Android, and Windows Phone.

They built a second office in Aarhus, Denmark, in 2016. In addition, to better serve their local clients and their needs, they built two additional offices in 2017: one in Manchester and one in Amsterdam.

They've completed over 1100 digital systems and over 200 custom mobile apps for companies like Carlsberg, Samsung, G4S/ ISS, and BMW.

Conclusion

I wish you luck in your hunt for the best mobile application development companies in London. Yet, remember that, while app developers in London are evolving with radical improvements that increase app usability, you must still examine all the abovementioned possibilities when choosing from the best app development companies in the globe. The organisations listed above have worked with clients from various countries, comprehended the market, economy of their target locations, and provided projects that successfully met the needs of their target audiences with minimum Mobile App Development Cost. These developers have years of experience and will provide you with excellent business advice.
